nodes.name: Get Booking
nodes.notes:
Looks up the CleaningJobs row by bookingUid.
Why: need fixedCleanerId, status, clockInTimeUTC, and propertyUid to validate against.

nodes.name: Merge Submission and Job
nodes.notes:
Combines the checkout submission data with the CleaningJobs data by position index.
Why: validation needs both the form submission and the job details in one object.

nodes.name: Validate Pre-GPS
nodes.notes:
Checks: cleaner match, clock-in status IN_PROGRESS, duration 30minâ€“6hrs.
Adds validationPass (PASS/FAIL) and validationMsg to each item.

nodes.name: Pre-GPS Check
nodes.notes:
TRUE = cleaner/status/duration checks passed â†’ proceed to GPS.
FALSE = failed â†’ reject with reason from validationMsg.

nodes.name: Reject Pre-GPS
nodes.notes:
Sets processingStatus=REJECTED with the reason from validationMsg.
Covers: wrong cleaner, no clock-in, too soon, too late.

parameters.jsCode:
// Pass through TRUE-branch items so Merge Coords can reference them reliably.
return $input.all();

nodes.name: Pass Validated Items
nodes.notes:
Stores items that passed pre-GPS validation for reference in Merge Coords.
Why: Get Property Coordinates replaces item data â€” we need to re-merge later.

nodes.name: Get Property Coordinates
nodes.notes:
Looks up latitude/longitude from the Properties tab by propertyUid.
Why: compare the cleaner's GPS against the property location for radius check.

nodes.name: Merge Coords with Submission
nodes.notes:
Re-merges the validated submission data with property coordinates by position.
Why: distance calculation needs both GPS points in one object.

nodes.name: Distance Calculation
nodes.notes:
Haversine formula: calculates meters between cleaner GPS and property GPS.
Adds distance (rounded meters) to each item. Defaults to 999999 if coords invalid.

nodes.name: Radius Check
nodes.notes:
TRUE = within 100m â†’ approve.
FALSE = too far â†’ reject with distance.

nodes.name: Reject GPS Outside
nodes.notes:
Sets processingStatus=REJECTED with distance in metres.
Cleaner can retry by submitting the form again.

nodes.name: Update CheckoutSubmissions APPROVED
nodes.notes:
Sets processingStatus=APPROVED and resultMessage in CheckoutSubmissions.
Why: marks this submission as validated and accepted.

nodes.name: Update CleaningJobs COMPLETED
nodes.notes:
Sets CleaningJobs status=COMPLETED and writes clockOutTimeUTC + GPS out fields.
Why: marks job done so Workflow 5 (payroll) can pick it up.

nodes.name: Update Reservations COMPLETED
nodes.notes:
Sets Reservations cleaningStatus=COMPLETED by bookingUid.
Why: external systems read cleaningStatus from Reservations tab.

parameters.content:
## Workflow 4W — Checkout Ingestion + Validation (Merged)
Webhook: POST /webhook/checkout

Replaces old 4W + 4B. Single sync request/response.
Response contract mirrors 3W:
 200 approved | 200 duplicate | 400 error | 403 rejected (pre-GPS or radius) | 404 not found | 500 insert/property fail
Maintenance + Supply logs fan out from Insert (logged regardless of GPS outcome).

parameters.subject: =Checkout Confirmed — {{ $('Radius Check').item.json.propertyName }}
=Job Completed — {{ $('Radius Check').item.json.propertyName }}
=Checkout Could Not Be Completed — {{ $('Merge Submission and Job').item.json.propertyName }}
=Checkout Rejected — Location Outside Allowed Radius
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.name || 'there' }},

Your checkout could not be accepted because your location was detected outside the allowed distance from the property.

Property: {{ $('Radius Check').item.json.propertyName }}
Booking Reference: {{ $('Radius Check').item.json.bookingUid }}
Detected Distance: {{ $('Radius Check').item.json.distance }} metres

Please move closer to the property and try again. If you believe this is an error, contact your manager.

Thank you,
